description: Multitenant Streamable HTTP wrapper for the SentinelOne purple-mcp server.
name: io.github.wyre-technology/sentinelone-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Public listen port for the proxy (POST /mcp, GET /health)
environmentVariables.name: PORT

environmentVariables.description: Idle tenant timeout before a purple-mcp child is evicted (ms)
environmentVariables.name: IDLE_EVICT_MS

environmentVariables.description: How long to wait for a spawned child to start serving HTTP (ms)
environmentVariables.name: SPAWN_READY_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Fastify log level: debug, info, warn, error
environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL

title: SentinelOne (Purple)
